questions.title: ABCDE assessment basics
questions.question_text: Outline the ABCDE approach for a new acute admission with shortness of breath.
expected_points: Airway: assess patency, look for obstruction, consider airway adjuncts
Breathing: rate, SpO2, chest expansion, auscultation, oxygen as indicated
Circulation: pulse, BP, capillary refill, IV access, fluids if needed
Exposure: temperature, rashes, edema; maintain dignity and warmth
Escalate early using SBAR if deteriorating

questions.title: NEWS2 interpretation
questions.question_text: A patient's observations are: RR 24, SpO2 92% on air, Temp 38.3, BP 98/58, HR 116, AVPU=A. What is the NEWS2 risk category and action?

questions.title: Oxygen therapy targets
questions.question_text: What SpO2 targets would you aim for in COPD versus non-COPD patients?

questions.title: Sepsis 6 initial actions
questions.question_text: List the Sepsis 6 actions to be completed within 1 hour.

questions.title: Fluids calculation (rate)
questions.question_text: Give 1L of crystalloid over 2 hours. What is the infusion rate in mL/hour?

questions.title: SBAR handover
questions.question_text: Provide a concise SBAR handover to escalate a NEWS2 8 patient with hypotension.
expected_points: Assessment: key concerns (e.g., hypotension, tachycardia, fever)
Recommendation: request urgent senior review/specific actions

questions.title: Falls risk and prevention
questions.question_text: List key interventions to reduce falls risk in a confused elderly patient.
expected_points: Call bell within reach, bed low and brakes on

questions.title: Delirium vs dementia quick screen
questions.question_text: Name two features that suggest delirium rather than dementia in AMU.

questions.title: Infection control
questions.question_text: State core steps for donning and doffing PPE safely in suspected influenza.
expected_points: Don: gown/apron → mask → eye protection → gloves
Doff: gloves → apron/gown → eye protection → mask, perform hand hygiene between steps

questions.title: ECG basics
questions.question_text: Name two red flags on ECG requiring urgent escalation.
expected_points: New-onset fast AF with hemodynamic instability

questions.title: Medication safety
questions.question_text: List three checks before IV antibiotic administration.
expected_points: Right patient, drug, dose, route, time
Dilution, compatibility, infusion rate as per guideline

questions.title: Pressure area care
questions.question_text: Name measures to prevent pressure ulcers in a bedbound patient awaiting transfer.
